title: nofetch Configuration
description: Schema for the nofetch system fetcher configuration files

order.description: The sequence of modules to display in the fetch output.

type.description: The type of component to render.

label.description: Custom text label for the component (e.g., 'Distro' or 'Processor').

value.description: Static text, evaluated primarily when type is 'custom'.

color.description: The color applied to the label and/or custom value.

icon.description: A Nerd Font icon character to display at the start of the row.
